mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalExpense, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as balance FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0
AND DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}
